Related Entities

  • hospital ATRIUM HEALTH NAVICENT THE MEDICAL CENTER 2-star overall rating
  • hospital COLISEUM MEDICAL CENTERS, LLC, DBA 3-star overall rating
  • hospital PIEDMONT MACON NORTH HOSPITAL
  • snf PRUITTHEALTH - MACON 2-star, 228 beds
  • snf ZEBULON PARK HEALTH AND REHABILITATION 4-star, 66 beds

  • snf PRUITTHEALTH - PEAKE 4-star, 122 beds
  • snf Blossom Healthcare & Rehabilitation Center 1-star, 143 beds
  • snf CHERRY BLOSSOM HEALTH AND REHABILITATION 3-star, 82 beds

  • snf Archway Transitional Care Center 2-star, 100 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
